scenario: After 90 days of KAIROS evolution, all elite agents converge to identical strategies — diversity collapses
failure_mode: Memetic monoculture: preferential attachment in the stepping stone archive causes all agents to build on the same successful proposals, eliminating variation
lesson: Biological diversity requires random drift AND selection. KAIROS has selection but may lack drift. Low-fitness memes need preservation to prevent monoculture.
counterfactual: Maintain a 'minority report' archive: preserve the most diverse proposals (maximally different from elite consensus) even if their scores are moderate
prevention: Add diversity pressure to group_evolution.py: when elite pool similarity (cosine) > 0.85, force inclusion of at least 2 maximally-different agents regardless of score.
